channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watch: Viral Teen Umpire Goes 'Bananas'
item.description: Eighteen-year-old little league umpire Sawyer Sparks gained attention for his on-field antics and now has a chance to work a game for the popular team.

item.title: AP-NORC poll shows decline in Trump support among independents
Chinese authorities detain U.S. citizen on espionage allegations
item.description: Chinese officials have arrested a U.S. citizen on espionage charges, state media reported.

item.title: Ohio voting rights group under criminal fraud investigation, sources say
item.description: The FBI executed a search warrant at an Ohio voter registration group as part of a fraud investigation.
